description: Spring RTS Synced Read API - functions that read game state. Can be called from both synced and unsynced code.

Game State.description: Query game-wide state: god mode, cheating, game over, etc.

functions.name: Spring.GetGaiaTeamID
functions.description: Returns the Gaia (neutral) team ID.

functions.name: Spring.IsGameOver
functions.description: Returns true if the game has ended.

functions.name: Spring.IsGodModeEnabled
functions.description: Returns true if god mode is active.

functions.name: Spring.IsCheatingEnabled
functions.description: Returns true if cheating is enabled.

functions.name: Spring.FixedAllies
functions.description: Returns true if alliances are fixed (cannot be changed).

RulesParams (Read).description: Read custom key-value parameters set on game, teams, units, or features.

functions.name: Spring.GetGameRulesParam
functions.description: Gets a global game rule parameter by name. Returns nil if not set.

functions.name: Spring.GetTeamRulesParam
functions.description: Gets a team rule parameter. Returns nil if not set.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitRulesParam
functions.description: Gets a unit rule parameter. Returns nil if not set.

functions.name: Spring.GetFeatureRulesParam
functions.description: Gets a feature rule parameter. Returns nil if not set.

functions.name: Spring.GetGameRulesParams
functions.description: Returns table of all game rule parameters.

functions.name: Spring.GetTeamRulesParams
functions.description: Returns table of all rule parameters for a team.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitRulesParams
functions.description: Returns table of all rule parameters for a unit.

Mod & Map Options.description: Read mod and map configuration options.

functions.name: Spring.GetModOptions
functions.description: Returns table of all mod options (from lobby/modoptions).

functions.name: Spring.GetMapOptions
functions.description: Returns table of all map options.

Speed & Time.description: Query game speed, frame count, and elapsed time.

functions.name: Spring.GetGameSpeed
functions.description: Returns userSpeedFactor, speedFactor, paused.

functions.name: Spring.GetGameFrame
functions.description: Returns current game frame number (two values: frameNum%dayFrames, frameNum/dayFrames).

functions.name: Spring.GetGameSeconds
functions.description: Returns elapsed game time in seconds.

Player & Team Info.description: Query player lists, team lists, alliances, and team details.

functions.name: Spring.GetPlayerList
functions.description: Returns table of player IDs. Optionally filter by team or active status.

functions.name: Spring.GetTeamList
functions.description: Returns table of team IDs. Optionally filter by allyTeam.

functions.name: Spring.GetAllyTeamList
functions.description: Returns table of all allyTeam IDs.

functions.name: Spring.GetPlayerInfo
functions.description: Returns name, active, spectator, teamID, allyTeamID, pingTime, cpuUsage, country, rank, customKeys.

functions.name: Spring.GetTeamInfo
functions.description: Returns teamID, leader, isDead, isAiTeam, side, allyTeam, incomeMultiplier, customKeys.

functions.name: Spring.GetAIInfo
functions.description: Returns skirmishAIID, name, hostingPlayerID, shortName, version, options for AI teams.

functions.name: Spring.AreTeamsAllied
functions.description: Returns true if the two teams are allied.

functions.name: Spring.ArePlayersAllied
functions.description: Returns true if the two players are allied.

functions.name: Spring.GetAllyTeamStartBox
functions.description: Returns xMin, zMin, xMax, zMax of the start box.

functions.name: Spring.GetTeamStartPosition
functions.description: Returns x, y, z of the team's start position.

Team Resources.description: Query team resource levels, income, storage, and stats. CRITICAL for economy gadgets.

functions.name: Spring.GetTeamResources
functions.description: Returns currentLevel, storage, pull, income, expense, share, sent, received. Use select() or multiple assignment to get specific values.

functions.name: Spring.GetTeamUnitStats
functions.description: Returns killed, died, capturedBy, capturedFrom, received, sent unit counts.

functions.name: Spring.GetTeamLuaAI
functions.description: Returns the Lua AI name for the team, or nil.

Unit Queries.description: Find units by team, area, or proximity.

functions.name: Spring.GetAllUnits
functions.description: Returns table of ALL unit IDs on the map. EXPENSIVE - avoid in GameFrame, use only in Initialize.

functions.name: Spring.GetTeamUnits
functions.description: Returns table of all unit IDs belonging to a team.

functions.name: Spring.GetTeamUnitsSorted
functions.description: Returns table of unit IDs sorted/grouped by unitDefID.

functions.name: Spring.GetTeamUnitsCounts
functions.description: Returns table of unitDefID -> count for a team.

functions.name: Spring.GetTeamUnitsByDefs
functions.signature: Spring.GetTeamUnitsByDefs(number teamID, number unitDefID | table unitDefs)
functions.description: Returns table of unit IDs matching specific unitDefIDs for a team.

functions.name: Spring.GetTeamUnitDefCount
functions.description: Returns count of units of a specific type for a team.

functions.name: Spring.GetTeamUnitCount
functions.description: Returns total unit count for a team.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitsInRectangle
functions.signature: Spring.GetUnitsInRectangle(number xmin, number zmin, number xmax, number zmax [, number teamID])
functions.description: Returns units within a rectangular area. Optional team filter.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitsInSphere
functions.signature: Spring.GetUnitsInSphere(number x, number y, number z, number radius [, number teamID])
functions.description: Returns units within a sphere. Optional team filter.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitsInCylinder
functions.signature: Spring.GetUnitsInCylinder(number x, number z, number radius [, number teamID])
functions.description: Returns units within a vertical cylinder. Optional team filter.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitNearestAlly
functions.description: Returns the nearest allied unit ID.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitNearestEnemy
functions.signature: Spring.GetUnitNearestEnemy(number unitID [, number range [, bool useLOS]])
functions.description: Returns the nearest enemy unit ID.

Unit Information.description: Read individual unit properties: ID validation, health, position, team, def, etc.

functions.name: Spring.ValidUnitID
functions.description: Returns true if the unitID is valid (unit exists). ALWAYS call before accessing unit properties.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitIsDead
functions.description: Returns true if the unit is dead/dying.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitDefID
functions.description: Returns the unitDefID. Use with UnitDefs[unitDefID] to look up static def data.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitTeam
functions.description: Returns the team ID that owns this unit.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitAllyTeam
functions.description: Returns the allyTeam ID of this unit.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitHealth
functions.description: Returns health, maxHealth, paralyzeDamage, captureProgress, buildProgress.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitIsStunned
functions.description: Returns stunned_or_inbuild, stunned, inbuild.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitPosition
functions.signature: Spring.GetUnitPosition(number unitID [, bool midPos [, bool aimPos]])
functions.description: Returns baseX, baseY, baseZ. Optionally also midpoint and aimpoint positions.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitDirection
functions.description: Returns dirX, dirY, dirZ facing direction vector.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitVelocity
functions.description: Returns velX, velY, velZ, velLength.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitRotation
functions.description: Returns pitch, yaw, roll.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitHeading
functions.description: Returns heading as integer.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitMaxRange
functions.description: Returns the maximum engagement range.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitExperience
functions.description: Returns the unit's current experience level.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitNeutral
functions.description: Returns true if the unit is neutral.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitArmored
functions.description: Returns armored state and armor multiplier.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitIsActive
functions.description: Returns true if the unit is active (turned on).

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitIsCloaked
functions.description: Returns true if the unit is currently cloaked.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitMass
functions.description: Returns the unit's mass.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitHeight
functions.description: Returns the unit's height.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitRadius
functions.description: Returns the unit's radius.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitBuildFacing
functions.description: Returns the build facing direction (0-3).

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitIsBuilding
functions.description: Returns the unitID of the unit being built, or nil.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitCurrentBuildPower
functions.description: Returns the current build power of a builder unit.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitTransporter
functions.description: Returns the transporter unitID, or nil if not transported.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitIsTransporting
functions.description: Returns table of transported unit IDs.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitLastAttacker
functions.description: Returns the unitID of the last unit that attacked this unit.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitSeparation
functions.signature: Spring.GetUnitSeparation(number unitID1, number unitID2 [, bool 2D [, bool surfaceDist]])
functions.description: Returns distance between two units.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitStates
functions.description: Returns table of unit states (fireState, moveState, repeat, cloak, active, trajectory, autoRepairLevel, loopbackAttack).

Unit Resourcing (Read).description: Read per-unit resource generation and consumption. Useful for economy gadgets.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitResources
functions.description: Returns metalMake, metalUse, energyMake, energyUse for this unit.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitMetalExtraction
functions.description: Returns the metal extraction rate for an extractor unit.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitHarvestStorage
functions.description: Returns the harvest storage metal amount.

Unit Weapons (Read).description: Read unit weapon state, damage, and targeting info.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitWeaponState
functions.description: Returns angleGood, loaded, reloadFrame, salvoLeft, numStockpiled.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitWeaponDamages
functions.signature: Spring.GetUnitWeaponDamages(number unitID, number weaponNum, string tag)
functions.description: Returns specific damage tag value for a weapon.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitWeaponVectors
functions.description: Returns weapon position (posX,posY,posZ) and direction (dirX,dirY,dirZ).

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitWeaponTarget
functions.description: Returns target type and target ID/position.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitWeaponCanFire
functions.description: Returns true if the weapon can currently fire.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitShieldState
functions.description: Returns isEnabled, curPower for a shield weapon.

Unit LOS (Read).description: Check unit visibility and LOS status.

functions.name: Spring.IsUnitInLos
functions.description: Returns true if unit is in line of sight for the allyTeam.

functions.name: Spring.IsUnitInRadar
functions.description: Returns true if unit is detected by radar for the allyTeam.

functions.name: Spring.IsUnitInAirLos
functions.description: Returns true if unit is in air LOS for the allyTeam.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitLosState
functions.signature: Spring.GetUnitLosState(number unitID [, number allyTeamID [, bool raw]])
functions.description: Returns LOS state for a unit relative to an allyTeam.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitSensorRadius
functions.description: Returns sensor radius. type: 'los','airLos','radar','sonar','seismic','radarJammer','sonarJammer'.

Unit Command Queue.description: Read a unit's current command queue and factory build orders.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitCommands
functions.description: Returns command queue table (or queue size if count is a number).

functions.name: Spring.GetCommandQueue
functions.description: Alias for GetUnitCommands.

functions.name: Spring.GetFullBuildQueue
functions.description: Returns full build queue for a factory.

functions.name: Spring.GetRealBuildQueue
functions.description: Returns real (deduplicated) build queue for a factory.

functions.name: Spring.GetFactoryCommands
functions.description: Returns factory-specific command queue.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitCmdDescs
functions.signature: Spring.GetUnitCmdDescs(number unitID [, number startIndex [, number endIndex]])
functions.description: Returns table of command description entries for a unit.

functions.name: Spring.FindUnitCmdDesc
functions.description: Returns the index of a command description by cmdID.

Feature Queries.description: Find and query features (wrecks, props, trees) on the map.

functions.name: Spring.GetAllFeatures
functions.description: Returns table of ALL feature IDs. EXPENSIVE - use sparingly.

functions.name: Spring.GetFeaturesInRectangle
functions.signature: Spring.GetFeaturesInRectangle(number xMin, number zMin, number xMax, number zMax)
functions.description: Returns features within a rectangular area.

functions.name: Spring.GetFeaturesInSphere
functions.signature: Spring.GetFeaturesInSphere(number x, number y, number z, number radius)
functions.description: Returns features within a sphere.

functions.name: Spring.GetFeaturesInCylinder
functions.signature: Spring.GetFeaturesInCylinder(number x, number z, number radius)
functions.description: Returns features within a vertical cylinder.

functions.name: Spring.ValidFeatureID
functions.description: Returns true if the featureID is valid.

functions.name: Spring.GetFeatureDefID
functions.description: Returns the featureDefID. Use with FeatureDefs[featureDefID].

functions.name: Spring.GetFeatureTeam
functions.description: Returns the team that owns the feature.

functions.name: Spring.GetFeatureAllyTeam
functions.description: Returns the allyTeam of the feature.

functions.name: Spring.GetFeatureHealth
functions.description: Returns health, maxHealth, resurrectProgress.

functions.name: Spring.GetFeaturePosition
functions.signature: Spring.GetFeaturePosition(number featureID [, bool midPos [, bool aimPos]])
functions.description: Returns position (bpX, bpY, bpZ). Optionally midpoint and aimpoint.

functions.name: Spring.GetFeatureResources
functions.description: Returns remainingMetal, maxMetal, remainingEnergy, maxEnergy, reclaimLeft, reclaimTime.

functions.name: Spring.GetFeatureDirection
functions.description: Returns dirX, dirY, dirZ.

functions.name: Spring.GetFeatureVelocity
functions.description: Returns velX, velY, velZ, velLength.

functions.name: Spring.GetFeatureHeading
functions.description: Returns heading.

functions.name: Spring.GetFeatureResurrect
functions.description: Returns unitDefName and buildFacing for resurrection.

functions.name: Spring.GetFeatureNoSelect
functions.description: Returns true if feature is non-selectable.

functions.name: Spring.GetFeatureBlocking
functions.description: Returns blocking flags (isBlocking, isSolidObjectCollidable, etc).

functions.name: Spring.GetFeatureMass
functions.description: Returns the feature's mass.

functions.name: Spring.GetFeatureRadius
functions.description: Returns the feature's radius.

functions.name: Spring.GetFeatureHeight
functions.description: Returns the feature's height.

Ground & Terrain.description: Read terrain height, ground info, metal map, and pathfinding.

functions.name: Spring.GetGroundHeight
functions.description: Returns ground height (y) at the given x,z coordinates.

functions.name: Spring.GetGroundOrigHeight
functions.description: Returns original (unmodified) ground height.

functions.name: Spring.GetGroundNormal
functions.signature: Spring.GetGroundNormal(number x, number z [, bool smoothedNormal])
functions.description: Returns normal vector (x,y,z) and slope at position.

functions.name: Spring.GetGroundInfo
functions.description: Returns terrain type name, metal, hardness, movement speeds, receiveTracks.

functions.name: Spring.GetGroundBlocked
functions.description: Returns what (if anything) is blocking the ground at the position.

functions.name: Spring.GetGroundExtremes
functions.description: Returns minHeight, maxHeight of the map.

functions.name: Spring.GetSmoothMeshHeight
functions.description: Returns smooth mesh height at position.

functions.name: Spring.GetMetalAmount
functions.description: Returns metal density at position.

functions.name: Spring.GetMetalMapSize
functions.description: Returns metal map sizeX, sizeY.

functions.name: Spring.TestMoveOrder
functions.signature: Spring.TestMoveOrder(number unitDefID, number posX, number posY, number posZ [, ...])
functions.description: Tests if a unit type can move to the given position. Returns bool.

functions.name: Spring.TestBuildOrder
functions.signature: Spring.TestBuildOrder(number unitDefID, number x, number y, number z, number facing)
functions.description: Tests if a building can be placed. Returns blocking status.

functions.name: Spring.Pos2BuildPos
functions.signature: Spring.Pos2BuildPos(number unitDefID, number x, number y, number z [, number facing])
functions.description: Snaps a position to valid build grid for the given unitDef.

functions.name: Spring.GetUnitEstimatedPath
functions.description: Returns waypoints table and waypointIndices for a unit's current path.

LOS & Visibility.description: Check if map positions are visible.

functions.name: Spring.IsPosInLos
functions.signature: Spring.IsPosInLos(number x, number y, number z, number allyID)
functions.description: Returns true if position is in line of sight for allyTeam.

functions.name: Spring.IsPosInRadar
functions.signature: Spring.IsPosInRadar(number x, number y, number z, number allyID)
functions.description: Returns true if position is in radar for allyTeam.

functions.name: Spring.IsPosInAirLos
functions.signature: Spring.IsPosInAirLos(number x, number y, number z, number allyID)
functions.description: Returns true if position is in air LOS for allyTeam.

functions.name: Spring.GetPositionLosState
functions.signature: Spring.GetPositionLosState(number x, number y, number z [, number allyID])
functions.description: Returns losOrRadar, inLos, inRadar, jammed.

functions.name: Spring.GetProjectilesInRectangle
functions.signature: Spring.GetProjectilesInRectangle(number xmin, number zmin, number xmax, number zmax [, bool excludeWeapon [, bool excludePiece]])
functions.description: Returns projectile IDs in a rectangular area.

functions.name: Spring.GetProjectileOwnerID
functions.description: Returns the unitID that fired this projectile.

functions.name: Spring.GetProjectileTeamID
functions.description: Returns the team that owns this projectile.

functions.name: Spring.GetProjectileDefID
functions.description: Returns the weaponDefID of this projectile.

functions.name: Spring.GetProjectilePosition
functions.description: Returns posX, posY, posZ.

functions.name: Spring.GetProjectileVelocity
functions.description: Returns velX, velY, velZ.

functions.name: Spring.GetProjectileTarget
functions.description: Returns target type and target ID or position.

functions.name: Spring.GetProjectileTimeToLive
functions.description: Returns remaining time to live in frames.

Vectors & Heading.description: Utility functions for heading/vector conversion and wind.

functions.name: Spring.GetHeadingFromVector
functions.description: Converts a direction vector to a heading value.

functions.name: Spring.GetVectorFromHeading
functions.description: Converts a heading to a direction vector (x, z).

functions.name: Spring.GetWind
functions.description: Returns dirX, dirY, dirZ, strength, normDirX, normDirY, normDirZ.

functions.name: Spring.GetCOBUnitVar
functions.signature: Spring.GetCOBUnitVar(number unitID, number varID [, bool unpack])
functions.description: Returns COB unit variable value.

functions.name: Spring.GetCOBTeamVar
functions.signature: Spring.GetCOBTeamVar(number teamID, number varID [, bool unpack])
functions.description: Returns COB team variable value.

functions.name: Spring.GetCOBAllyTeamVar
functions.signature: Spring.GetCOBAllyTeamVar(number allyID, number varID [, bool unpack])
functions.description: Returns COB allyTeam variable value.

functions.name: Spring.GetCOBGlobalVar
functions.description: Returns COB global variable value.
